- [x] Verify copilot-instructions file exists.
- [x] Clarify project requirements.
- [x] Scaffold the project in the current directory.
- [x] Customize the project for Health Sciences Library portal workflows.
- [x] Install required dependencies.
- [x] Compile the project and resolve issues.
- [x] Create and run task (if needed).
- [x] Launch project after user confirmation.
- [x] Ensure documentation is complete.

Project scope:
- React + TypeScript frontend with modular architecture.
- Supabase auth, PostgreSQL schema, and role-based access (student/admin).
- Functional pages for attendance, repository, requests, announcements, and room reservations.
- Blue and white academic responsive interface using reusable components.
